tests_point: must-complete async cleanup needs @async.protect_from_cancel (cancellation kills async ops inside defer/catch cleanup at the next suspension point)
naive_failure: defer { conn.send("END") } — the async send suspends during cancellation and is itself cancelled, so END never reaches the connection; the cancellation conformance test fails
verify: conformance moon test --target native (pure behavioral, incl. with_timeout cancellation)
